flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fisher College fell 52% between 2021 and 2024 (32.2% → 15.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fisher College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (35.6% → 27.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Fisher College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($22.4k → $25.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fisher College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
